title.en: Nightshoots with X-T3 and XF 56mm f/1.2
title.no: Nightshoots with X-T3 and XF 56mm f/1.2

summary.en: In this post, I briefly touch on the problems using the XF 56mm f/1.2 in low light scenarios. The cover photo was taken using this lens at 1/125s, 2500 ISO — wide open.
summary.no: In this post, I briefly touch on the problems using the XF 56mm f/1.2 in low light scenarios. The cover photo was taken using this lens at 1/125s, 2500 ISO — wide open.
